rows.label: tlk45300143_02_msg0001
rows.name:
A mercenary's work always
keeps him close to death.

rows.label: tlk45300143_02_msg0002
rows.name:
I guess even the leader of the
Hræsvelgr Mercenaries is no exception.

rows.label: tlk45300143_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Vandham was a fine man, a strong
fighter and a charismatic leader,
but death came for him all the same.

rows.label: tlk45300143_02_msg0004
rows.name:
No time to sit around depressed.
If you're taking his place,
you have work to do!

rows.label: tlk45300143_02_msg0005
rows.name:
That goes for all of us. All we can
do now is to keep moving forward.
